fields.label: Maximum Concurrent Trades
fields.description: Maximum number of trades to open simultaneously
fields.tooltip: Higher values increase potential profit but also risk

fields.label: Stop Loss Percentage
fields.description: Stop loss as percentage of account balance
fields.tooltip: Lower values provide tighter risk control

fields.label: Use Trailing Stop Loss
fields.description: Enable trailing stop loss to lock in profits as price moves favorably

fields.label: Trading Mode
fields.tooltip: Conservative: Lower risk, lower returns. Aggressive: Higher risk, higher potential returns.

fields.label: Active Trading Sessions
fields.description: Select which trading sessions to be active during
fields.tooltip: London and New York overlap provides highest liquidity
